requirement_topic.en: UKCA Marking — Great Britain Market Placement Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: UKCA标志——大不列颠市场投放要求
requirement_topic.zht: UKCA標誌——大不列顛市場投放要求

summary.en: For industrial motors under the Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101), Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091), and ecodesign rules where applicable, GB product law requires the product to comply with the relevant legislation and carry an accepted conformity marking. Current UK government guidance recognises either UKCA or CE marking for GB electrical equipment, electromagnetic compatibility, machinery, RoHS, and ecodesign product categories where requirements remain aligned; CE recognition did not end on 31 December 2024 for these categories. Northern Ireland operates separately under the Windsor Framework, where CE-based rules continue to apply.
summary.zh: 对于受《2016年电气设备安全法规》（SI 2016/1101）、《2016年电磁兼容法规》（SI 2016/1091）以及适用生态设计规则约束的工业电动机，大不列颠产品法规要求产品符合相关法律并带有被接受的合格标志。按英国政府现行指南，在要求保持一致的电气设备、电磁兼容、机械、RoHS和生态设计产品类别中，大不列颠接受UKCA或CE标志；这些类别的CE认可并未于2024年12月31日结束。北爱尔兰依据《温莎框架》单独适用，继续采用CE路径规则。
summary.zht: 對於受《2016年電氣設備安全法規》（SI 2016/1101）、《2016年電磁相容法規》（SI 2016/1091）以及適用生態設計規則約束的工業電動機，大不列顛產品法規要求產品符合相關法律並帶有被接受的合格標誌。按英國政府現行指南，在要求保持一致的電氣設備、電磁相容、機械、RoHS和生態設計產品類別中，大不列顛接受UKCA或CE標誌；這些類別的CE認可並未於2024年12月31日結束。北愛爾蘭依據《溫莎框架》單獨適用，繼續採用CE路徑規則。

standards_or_laws: Windsor Framework (Northern Ireland — CE marking continues)

summary.en: China's equivalent mandatory market-access marking is the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mark (3C mark / 中国强制认证). CCC is required for products listed in the CCC catalogue before they can be sold or used in China. General industrial three-phase motors (普通工业用三相异步电动机) are listed in the CCC catalogue under low-voltage electrical apparatus. CCC is administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China) and testing is conducted by designated laboratories. CCC is a third-party certification process (not self-declaration) and requires factory inspection.
summary.zh: 中国对应的强制性市场准入标志为CCC（中国强制认证）标志（3C标志）。列入CCC目录的产品在中国销售或使用前须获得CCC认证。普通工业用三相异步电动机列于低压电器目录下。CCC由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理，测试由指定实验室进行。CCC为第三方认证流程（而非自我声明），须接受工厂检查。
summary.zht: 中國對應的強制性市場准入標誌為CCC（中國強制認證）標誌（3C標誌）。列入CCC目錄的產品在中國銷售或使用前須獲得CCC認證。普通工業用三相異步電動機列於低壓電器目錄下。CCC由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理，測試由指定實驗室進行。CCC為第三方認證流程（而非自我聲明），須接受工廠檢查。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — administered by CNCA under Regulations on Compulsory Product Certification
GB 755-2019 as the technical standard for CCC assessment of three-phase induction motors

gap.en: CCC is not recognised for UK market access; the UK operates a separate conformity framework. A Chinese motor with CCC certification must still comply with applicable GB legislation and use an accepted GB marking route. For the relevant motor categories, current guidance allows UKCA or CE marking for Great Britain. UKCA is usually self-declaration for electrical equipment/EMC and is supported by a DoC, technical file, and evidence from designated or recognised harmonised standards where used. The marking regimes are parallel and non-transferable: CCC satisfies China domestic requirements; UKCA or recognised CE documentation satisfies the GB route.
gap.zh: CCC认证不被英国市场准入认可；英国实行独立的合规框架。持有CCC认证的中国电机仍须符合适用的大不列颠法规，并采用被接受的大不列颠标志路径。对于相关电机类别，现行指南允许在大不列颠使用UKCA或CE标志。对电气设备/电磁兼容而言，UKCA通常为自我声明，并以符合性声明、技术文件以及所采用的指定或被认可协调标准证据支持。两种制度并行且不可相互转换：CCC满足中国国内要求；UKCA或被认可CE文件满足大不列颠路径。
gap.zht: CCC認證不被英國市場准入認可；英國實行獨立的合規框架。持有CCC認證的中國電機仍須符合適用的大不列顛法規，並採用被接受的大不列顛標誌路徑。對於相關電機類別，現行指南允許在大不列顛使用UKCA或CE標誌。對電氣設備/電磁相容而言，UKCA通常為自我聲明，並以符合性聲明、技術文件以及所採用的指定或被認可協調標準證據支持。兩種制度並行且不可相互轉換：CCC滿足中國國內要求；UKCA或被認可CE文件滿足大不列顛路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — comply with applicable GB product regulations and use an accepted conformity marking route; UKCA or CE may be used for GB electrical equipment, EMC and ecodesign categories under current guidance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC required for three-phase induction motors for domestic China market sale; not required for export

compliance_verdict.en: A Chinese motor must comply with the applicable GB product regulations before GB market placement. CCC certification has no equivalence or mutual recognition with UKCA/CE. Exporters should maintain a technical file, complete the relevant DoC, and affix an accepted GB marking: UKCA or CE for electrical equipment, EMC, and ecodesign categories under current guidance. For Northern Ireland, CE marking continues under the Windsor Framework.
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国电机在投放大不列颠市场前须符合适用的大不列颠产品法规。CCC认证与UKCA/CE之间不存在等效或互认。出口商应保存技术文件、完成相关符合性声明，并加贴大不列颠接受的标志：按现行指南，电气设备、电磁兼容和生态设计类别可使用UKCA或CE。北爱尔兰依据《温莎框架》继续适用CE标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國電機在投放大不列顛市場前須符合適用的大不列顛產品法規。CCC認證與UKCA/CE之間不存在等效或互認。出口商應保存技術文件、完成相關符合性聲明，並加貼大不列顛接受的標誌：按現行指南，電氣設備、電磁相容和生態設計類別可使用UKCA或CE。北愛爾蘭依據《溫莎框架》繼續適用CE標誌。

requirement_topic.en: UK Declaration of Conformity (UK DoC) — Content and Obligations
requirement_topic.zh: 英国符合性声明（UK DoC）——内容及义务
requirement_topic.zht: 英國符合性聲明（UK DoC）——內容及義務

summary.en: A UK Declaration of Conformity (UK DoC), or recognised CE Declaration of Conformity where the CE route is used for GB under current guidance, is the manufacturer's written statement that a product meets the applicable product regulations. For industrial motors, the DoC should identify the product, manufacturer and postal address, applicable UK regulations or recognised EU product regulations, and any voluntary designated/harmonised standards applied for presumption of conformity. Authorised representative information is included only where one has been appointed or where a sector rule requires it. The DoC must be retained and made available to market surveillance authorities on request.
summary.zh: 英国符合性声明（UK DoC），或在按现行指南为大不列颠采用CE路径时被认可的欧盟符合性声明，是制造商声明产品符合适用产品法规的书面文件。对于工业电动机，符合性声明应标识产品、制造商及邮政地址、适用英国法规或被认可的欧盟产品法规，以及为获得符合性推定而采用的任何自愿指定/协调标准。只有在已指定授权代表或行业规则要求时，才纳入授权代表信息。符合性声明须保存，并在市场监管机构要求时提供。
summary.zht: 英國符合性聲明（UK DoC），或在按現行指南為大不列顛採用CE路徑時被認可的歐盟符合性聲明，是製造商聲明產品符合適用產品法規的書面文件。對於工業電動機，符合性聲明應標識產品、製造商及郵政地址、適用英國法規或被認可的歐盟產品法規，以及為獲得符合性推定而採用的任何自願指定/協調標準。只有在已指定授權代表或行業規則要求時，才納入授權代表資訊。符合性聲明須保存，並在市場監管機構要求時提供。

standards_or_laws: The Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101), Schedule 2 (DoC content)
The Ecodesign for Energy-Related Products and Energy Information Regulations 2021 (SI 2021/745)

summary.en: For domestic Chinese market sale, a CCC Certificate (issued by a CNCA-designated certification body following factory inspection and product testing) serves as the market-access credential. There is no Chinese equivalent to the EU/UK DoC self-declaration system. For export, Chinese manufacturers may issue a self-declaration or conformity statement as part of their commercial documentation, but this carries no formal recognition under Chinese law and is not equivalent to a UK DoC. The UK DoC must be issued specifically for UK regulations by the manufacturer or an authorised UK authorised representative, where applicable.
summary.zh: 对于在中国国内市场销售，CCC证书（由CNCA指定认证机构经工厂检查和产品测试后颁发）是市场准入凭证。中国没有与欧盟/英国符合性声明自我申报制度相对应的机制。对于出口，中国制造商可在商业文件中出具自我声明或符合性声明，但这在中国法律下不具正式效力，也不等同于英国符合性声明。英国符合性声明须由制造商或经授权的英国授权代表（如适用）专门依据英国法规出具。
summary.zht: 對於在中國國內市場銷售，CCC證書（由CNCA指定認證機構經工廠檢查和產品測試後頒發）是市場准入憑證。中國沒有與歐盟/英國符合性聲明自我申報制度相對應的機制。對於出口，中國製造商可在商業文件中出具自我聲明或符合性聲明，但這在中國法律下不具正式效力，也不等同於英國符合性聲明。英國符合性聲明須由製造商或經授權的英國授權代表（如適用）專門依據英國法規出具。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) process — CNCA-issued certificate, not self-declaration
No direct Chinese equivalent to UK DoC self-declaration for domestic market

gap.en: A Chinese manufacturer's existing CCC documentation, GB-standard test reports, and factory certificates cannot substitute for GB conformity documentation. The file must address GB legislation or the recognised EU route, not merely Chinese GB standards. Authorised representative details are not a blanket requirement; they are included where appointed or required by the sector rule. Importer and manufacturer identification duties must be handled separately on product, packaging, or accompanying documents as applicable.
gap.zh: 中国制造商现有的CCC文件、GB标准测试报告和工厂证书不能替代大不列颠合规文件。文件须针对大不列颠法规或被认可的欧盟路径，而不能仅引用中国GB标准。授权代表信息并非一概强制；只有在已指定或行业规则要求时才纳入。制造商和进口商身份标识义务须按适用情况在产品、包装或随附文件中另行处理。
gap.zht: 中國製造商現有的CCC文件、GB標準測試報告和工廠證書不能替代大不列顛合規文件。文件須針對大不列顛法規或被認可的歐盟路徑，而不能僅引用中國GB標準。授權代表資訊並非一概強制；只有在已指定或行業規則要求時才納入。製造商和進口商身份標識義務須按適用情況在產品、包裝或隨附文件中另行處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — relevant conformity documentation required under applicable GB product regulations or recognised CE route; references to BS EN/EN standards are voluntary presumption-of-conformity evidence, not mandatory law
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent — CCC certificate (third-party issued) serves as the CN market-access credential

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese manufacturers must prepare GB-market conformity documentation addressing SI 2016/1101, SI 2016/1091, and ecodesign rules as applicable, or rely on recognised CE documentation where that route is used. BS EN/EN standards may be cited as voluntary presumption-of-conformity evidence. Authorised representative details are required only where appointed or sector-specific rules require them; importer/manufacturer identification and postal address duties still apply as separate labelling obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国制造商须准备针对SI 2016/1101、SI 2016/1091及适用生态设计规则的大不列颠市场合规文件，或在采用CE路径时依赖被认可的CE文件。BS EN/EN标准可作为自愿的符合性推定证据引用。只有在已指定或行业特定规则要求时才需要授权代表信息；进口商/制造商身份及邮政地址义务仍作为单独标签义务适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國製造商須準備針對SI 2016/1101、SI 2016/1091及適用生態設計規則的大不列顛市場合規文件，或在採用CE路徑時依賴被認可的CE文件。BS EN/EN標準可作為自願的符合性推定證據引用。只有在已指定或行業特定規則要求時才需要授權代表資訊；進口商/製造商身份及郵政地址義務仍作為單獨標籤義務適用。

requirement_topic.en: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — Not Required for UK Export
requirement_topic.zh: CCC（中国强制认证）——出口英国无需申请
requirement_topic.zht: CCC（中國強制認證）——出口英國無需申請

summary.en: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is a Chinese domestic market requirement and has no relevance to UK market access. The UK does not recognise or require CCC for products entering the GB market. Products intended solely for export may be manufactured and sold without CCC certification under Chinese regulations (export-only exemption applies). For UK market access, the applicable conformity framework is UKCA (under SI 2016/1101 and SI 2016/1091) — not CCC. Manufacturers should not affix CCC marks on products destined for the UK market in place of UKCA; the UKCA mark is what UK enforcement authorities will look for.
summary.zh: CCC（中国强制认证）是中国国内市场要求，与英国市场准入无关。英国既不认可CCC，也不要求进入大不列颠市场的产品持有CCC认证。根据中国法规，仅用于出口的产品可在不获得CCC认证的情况下生产和销售（适用出口豁免）。英国市场准入适用的合规框架为UKCA（依据SI 2016/1101和SI 2016/1091），而非CCC。制造商不应在出口英国的产品上以CCC标志代替UKCA标志；UKCA标志才是英国执法机构所查验的标志。
summary.zht: CCC（中國強制認證）是中國國內市場要求，與英國市場准入無關。英國既不認可CCC，也不要求進入大不列顛市場的產品持有CCC認證。根據中國法規，僅用於出口的產品可在不獲得CCC認證的情況下生產和銷售（適用出口豁免）。英國市場准入適用的合規框架為UKCA（依據SI 2016/1101和SI 2016/1091），而非CCC。製造商不應在出口英國的產品上以CCC標誌代替UKCA標誌；UKCA標誌才是英國執法機構所查驗的標誌。

standards_or_laws: UK Government UKCA marking guidance (gov.uk/guidance/ukca) — CCC not mentioned as equivalent
China Compulsory Certification Regulations (CNCA) — domestic China requirement only

summary.en: CCC is mandatory for general industrial three-phase induction motors sold or used in China (listed in the CCC catalogue under low-voltage electrical apparatus). Manufacturers holding CCC certificates for their products satisfy domestic Chinese market-access requirements. However, CCC certification testing (conducted to GB standards by CNCA-designated labs) is separate from UK conformity assessment and provides no carry-over benefit for UKCA purposes. An export-only exemption under Chinese regulations allows motors produced exclusively for export to be manufactured without CCC, but those motors cannot legally be sold domestically.
summary.zh: CCC对中国境内销售或使用的普通工业三相感应电动机为强制性要求（列于低压电器CCC目录下）。持有CCC证书的制造商满足中国国内市场准入要求。但CCC认证测试（由CNCA指定实验室依据GB标准进行）与英国合格评定是相互独立的，对UKCA认证没有任何延伸效益。中国法规下的出口豁免允许专为出口生产的电机无需取得CCC认证，但此类电机不得在中国境内合法销售。
summary.zht: CCC對中國境內銷售或使用的普通工業三相感應電動機為強制性要求（列於低壓電器CCC目錄下）。持有CCC證書的製造商滿足中國國內市場准入要求。但CCC認證測試（由CNCA指定實驗室依據GB標準進行）與英國合格評定是相互獨立的，對UKCA認證沒有任何延伸效益。中國法規下的出口豁免允許專為出口生產的電機無需取得CCC認證，但此類電機不得在中國境內合法銷售。

standards_or_laws: Regulations on Compulsory Product Certification (China) — CCC mandatory for domestic sale
CCC export-only exemption — motors produced solely for export may be exempt from CCC

gap.en: There is no regulatory gap in the strict sense here: CCC and UKCA are parallel, non-overlapping obligations. The key practical point for exporters is that neither system benefits the other — a CCC-certified motor still needs UKCA for GB, and a UKCA-marked motor still needs CCC for China domestic sale. Motors exported to the UK do not need CCC (export exemption applies), simplifying the Chinese side of the paperwork, but the GB conformity documentation, accepted UKCA or CE marking route, and applicable UK manufacturer/importer identification duties must still be completed for GB entry.
gap.zh: 严格而言，此处不存在法规差距：CCC和UKCA是并行且互不重叠的义务。对出口商而言，关键实际要点是：两套制度对彼此均无裨益——持有CCC认证的电机进入大不列颠市场仍须取得UKCA认证，而持有UKCA标志的电机在中国境内销售仍须获得CCC认证。出口英国的电机无需CCC（适用出口豁免），简化了中国侧的文件工作，但进入英国仍须完成大不列颠合规文件、被接受的UKCA或CE标志路径及适用的英国制造商/进口商身份标识义务。
gap.zht: 嚴格而言，此處不存在法規差距：CCC和UKCA是並行且互不重疊的義務。對出口商而言，關鍵實際要點是：兩套制度對彼此均無裨益——持有CCC認證的電機進入大不列顛市場仍須取得UKCA認證，而持有UKCA標誌的電機在中國境內銷售仍須獲得CCC認證。出口英國的電機無需CCC（適用出口豁免），簡化了中國側的文件工作，但進入英國仍須完成大不列顛合規文件、被接受的UKCA或CE標誌路徑及適用的英國製造商/進口商身份標識義務。

mandatory_status.target: CCC not required — UK market access is governed by applicable GB product regulations, conformity documentation, accepted UKCA or CE marking route, and manufacturer/importer identification duties
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory for domestic China market sale; export-only exemption available for motors produced solely for export

compliance_verdict.en: CCC certification has no bearing on UK market access. Motors exported from China to the UK do not require CCC (export-only exemption applies under Chinese regulations). GB entry requires compliance with applicable product regulations, suitable conformity documentation, an accepted UKCA or CE marking route, and UK manufacturer/importer identification with postal address as applicable. The certification regimes are separate.
compliance_verdict.zh: CCC认证与英国市场准入无关。从中国出口英国的电机无需CCC认证（中国法规下适用出口豁免）。进入大不列颠须符合适用产品法规，准备合适的合规文件，采用被接受的UKCA或CE标志路径，并按适用情况标注英国制造商/进口商身份及邮政地址。两套认证制度相互独立。
compliance_verdict.zht: CCC認證與英國市場准入無關。從中國出口英國的電機無需CCC認證（中國法規下適用出口豁免）。進入大不列顛須符合適用產品法規，準備合適的合規文件，採用被接受的UKCA或CE標誌路徑，並按適用情況標注英國製造商/進口商身份及郵政地址。兩套認證制度相互獨立。
